record.field: Internal shipments: user read access

['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'employee'), ('recipient_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('recipient_department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'all'), ('recipient_department_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.ids), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'specific'), ('recipient_selected_employee_ids', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_store_id', 'in', user.ab_department_ids.store_id.ids), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'all'), ('recipient_store_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.store_id.ids), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'specific'), ('recipient_selected_employee_ids', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('created_by_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('sender_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('sender_employee_id.department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('sender_employee_id.department_id.store_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.store_id.ids), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'department'), ('sender_department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'branch'), '|', ('sender_store_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.store_id.ids), ('sender_store_id', 'in', user.ab_department_ids.store_id.ids)]
Internal shipments: creator workflow write
[('created_by_id', '=', user.id), ('state', 'in', ('draft', 'sent', 'in_transit'))]
Internal shipments: recipient receipt write

['&', ('state', '=', 'awaiting_receipt'), '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'employee'), ('recipient_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('recipient_department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'all'), ('recipient_department_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.ids), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'specific'), ('recipient_selected_employee_ids', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_store_id', 'in', user.ab_department_ids.store_id.ids), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'all'), ('recipient_store_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.store_id.ids), '&', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'specific'), ('recipient_selected_employee_ids', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids)]
Internal shipments: close confirmed shipments
[('state', 'in', ('received', 'closed'))]
Internal shipments: system administrator all
Internal shipment lines: user read access

['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '&', ('shipment_id.recipient_type', '=', 'employee'), ('shipment_id.recipient_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('shipment_id.recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('shipment_id.recipient_department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', '&', ('shipment_id.recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('shipment_id.recipient_employee_selection_type', '=', 'all'), ('shipment_id.recipient_store_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.store_id.ids), '&', '&', ('shipment_id.recipient_type', '=', ('shipment_id.created_by_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('shipment_id.sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('shipment_id.sender_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('shipment_id.sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('shipment_id.sender_employee_id.department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('shipment_id.sender_type', '=', 'employee'), Internal shipment lines: creator draft write
[('shipment_id.created_by_id', '=', user.id), ('shipment_id.state', '=', 'draft')]
Internal shipment lines: system administrator all
Internal shipment history: user read access

['|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '&', ('shipment_id.recipient_type', '=', 'employee'), ('shipment_id.recipient_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('shipment_id.recipient_type', ['|', ('shipment_id.created_by_id', '=', user.id), ('shipment_id.received_by_id', '=', user.id)]
Internal shipment history: system administrator all
Internal shipment menus: hide reporting from users
['|', ('name', '!=', 'Reporting'), ('parent_id.name', '!=', 'Internal Shipments')]
Internal shipment menus: system administrator all
Internal shipment server actions: hide reporting from users
['|', ('name', '!=', 'Shipment Statistics'), ('model_id.model', '!=', 'ab_internal_shipment')]
Internal shipment server actions: system administrator all
Internal shipment window actions: hide reporting from users
['|', ('name', '!=', 'Shipment Statistics'), ('res_model', '!=', 'ab_internal_shipment')]
Internal shipment window actions: system administrator all
